title: Add friction resolve workflow
goal: Turn the Grabowski friction ledger from an accumulating observation log into a resolvable decision ledger with explicit closeout evidence for recurring failure classes.

acceptance.assertion: A friction resolve or triage path records event_id, decision, status, evidence_ref, resolved_by, closed_at and non-claims without rewriting raw historical events unsafely.
Recurring Platform-Filter, policy-gate, environment-tooling and actionable-failure classes can be closed or deliberately deferred with a canonical decision and evidence.
friction_summary separates unresolved, resolved, superseded and deferred events so stale already-fixed findings do not dominate next-decision output.
Resolvable friction can create or link Bureau tasks without implying task readiness, merge readiness or owner approval.
Focused tests cover resolving one event, resolving a class, duplicate closeout, invalid event id, deferred-with-reason and summary counts.

metadata.source: User requested phases 1-4 from the 2026-07-08 Grabowski optimization plan be registered as Bureau tasks.
metadata.live_basis: Recent friction summary had 39 events with 34 unresolved decision-required events; some findings are already technically obsolete after recovery/tool-surface changes.
